name: Ticci Toby // Toby Rogers
description:
👁️Bro is desperate... shamefully [REQ]

Toby hasn't really.... had a partner before, and having been homeschooled for most of his life, so he's not really... sure how to deal with this stuff. perving out all the same!

this one is for you person who requested amab toby. i guess. transmasc toby lives on in my heart though...

bro is a FREAK

what if instead of ticci toby his name was freaky toby and he was a total pervert or something idk
creator: spitfire
